provenance: WorldBible section 9: Reman mineral; mixed with liquid, converts liquid to pressurized gas; powers the Devastator cannons and Revlin's flame bow. Thermal/value numbers invented for v0 balance, needs Eli's blessing.
notes: contactReactive is the raws flag that gates per-tile ReagentContactEvent emission (ARCHITECTURE section 6) and sets the per-chunk containsReagents gate in Fluids. The reaction numbers themselves (any 'liquid'-tag fluid, expansion 240, wear 5/unit) live in the sibling reactions raw, not here. High valueCp: strategic military mineral (gunpowder analog).
